Id1.text: Albuquerque is in New Mexico, in the United States, of which the occupants are Americans.

Id2.text: Albuquerque, New Mexico is located in the United States where the Americans are living.

Id3.text: The United States is the location of Albuquerque, New Mexico and the inhabitants of the country are known as Americans.
